condiment.ex: Mustard is a very popular local condiment.

condition.def: 條件、狀況、地位、使適應的人的人人物 (單數)
condition.col: on condition that, medical condition, air condition
condition.ex: The house is in a very poor local condition.

conditional.def: 有條件的、條件句的人的人物
conditional.ex: She received a conditional offer from university.

conditionally.ex: The plan was accepted conditionally today.

conditioned.def: 有條件的、受制約的人的人 (或物)
conditioned.ex: A Pavlovian dog has a conditioned reflex.

conditioner.def: 調節器、潤絲精、潤膚乳的人物 (單數)
conditioner.ex: The air conditioner is broken tonight.

conditioning.def: 調節、訓練、制約的人 (或物)
conditioning.ex: Physical conditioning is vital for athletes.

condo.def: (口)公寓、獨立產權公寓人物 (單數)
condo.ex: They bought a luxury condo in the city center.

condole.def: 哀悼、同情、慰問的人的人
condole.ex: Friends came to condole with the widow.

condolence.ex: Please accept my sincere condolences today.

condominium.def: 公寓、共同統治、共同領土的人物 (單數)
condominium.ex: The modern condominium offers many local perks.

condonable.def: 可寬恕的人的人物 (單數)
condonable.ex: His bad behavior is not easily condonable.

condone.def: 寬恕、原諒、容忍的人的人
condone.ex: We cannot condone violence of any kind.

condor.ex: The Andean condor is a truly massive local bird.

conduce.ex: Hard work will conduce to your future success.

conducive.ex: The quiet room is conducive to study.

conduct.def: 行為、指導、經營、實施、指揮的人的人的人物 (單數)
conduct.col: code of conduct, professional conduct, conduct survey
conduct.ex: They decided to conduct a market survey.

conductance.ex: The copper wire has a high electrical conductance.

conduction.ex: Heat conduction through metal is very fast.

conductivity.def: 傳導性、傳導率的人物 (單數)
conductivity.ex: The thermal conductivity of wood is quite low.

conductor.def: 指揮、導體、列車員的人物 (單數)
conductor.ex: A lightning conductor protects the tall house.

conduit.def: 導管、水管、溝渠的人物 (單數)
conduit.ex: Wire went through a local electrical conduit.

cone.def: 圓錐體、毬果、錐形瓶、圓錐形物的人物 (單數)
cone.col: traffic cone, pine cone, ice-cream cone
cone.ex: I'd like an ice-cream cone with two scoops.

coney/cony.ex: The soft coney fur was used to make a hat.

confab.ex: The players had a quick confab on the field.

confabulate.def: 閒談、打交道、虛構的人的人
confabulate.ex: They sat for hours to confabulate together.

confect.def: 調製、做成、雜燴的人的人人物 (單數)
confect.ex: The cook managed to confect a local dessert.

confection.def: 糖果、軟製劑、精緻成品的人物 (單數)
confection.ex: The wedding cake was an elaborate confection.

confectionary.def: 糖果的、製作糖果的人的人的人物
confectionary.ex: There is a small confectionary shop on street.

confectioner.ex: The local confectioner makes the best fudge.

confectionery.def: 糖果(總稱)、糖果店人物 (單數)
confectionery.ex: She bought some local confectionery for party.

confederacy.def: 聯盟、同盟、(美史)南部聯盟的人物 (單數)
confederacy.ex: The local tribes formed a loose confederacy.

confederate.def: 同盟的、共犯、合夥人的人的人物
confederate.ex: He was a secret confederate of the rebels today.

confederation.ex: They formed a loose confederation for trade.

confer.def: 商議、授予、贈與的人的人
confer.ex: Wait for me to confer with my local colleagues.

conference.def: 會議、討論、聯盟人物 (單數)
conference.col: press conference, international conference, video conference
conference.ex: The leader held a brief press conference today.

confess.def: 承認、供認、懺悔的人的人
confess.ex: The suspect finally decided to confess to theft.

confession.def: 承認、供認、告解、信經人物 (單數)
confession.col: forced confession, go to confession, confession of faith
confession.ex: The forced confession was not accepted at all.

confessional.def: 懺悔的、告解室人物 (單數)
confessional.ex: He entered the dark confessional booth today.

confessor.def: 告解神父、認罪者的人物 (單數)
confessor.ex: The royal confessor advised the king tonight.

confetti.def: 五彩碎紙、喜糖人物 (複數)
confetti.ex: People threw colorful confetti at the couple.

confidant.ex: She shared her secret with a trusted confidant.

confidante.ex: She has been her most loyal confidante for years.

confide.def: 吐露、委託、信賴的人的人
confide.ex: I don't think I can confide in him any longer.
